chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1592 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 3. For orders on MA-13833/2016 24.10.2016. Mr. Aslam Baig Laghari, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Nasrullah Khaskheli, Advocate for respondents No.3 & 5 to 8 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w SIP Lutuf Ali. = Today, objections have been filed by private respondents, in which they have denied that they are causing harassment to the petitioner. With the objections, the record of proceedings in the nature of Section 22-A Cr.P.C has also been enclosed, from which it appears that petitioner and private respondents are entangled in some contingency litigation. Learned Additional A.G has also filed comments on behalf of police officials/respondents, wherein they have categorically mentioned that police officials are not siding with any of the parties hereto. The present petition is disposed of with the direction that the private respondents will not take law in their hands and shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and if they have any grievance, they will avail the appropriate remedy in the competent Court of law. Similarly, the official respondents are also directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
